rules: Combined IDs may use up to 3 letters; primary letter goes first.

milestones.name: Native Gantt + Agile visualization in Luvatrix
success_criteria: Must comply with first-party Luvatrix App Protocol contracts.
Schema, renderer, interaction, export, and validation flows must remain first-party module driven and deterministic.
Do not mark complete without task-level App Protocol compliance evidence plus passing test/demo evidence.

acceptance_checks.T-1101: Schema contract includes milestone/task/dependency/owner fields with strict status validation; tests prove canonical parse/load and first-party type export.
acceptance_checks.T-1102: Gantt renderer produces deterministic axis/status/dependency output with collapsed/expanded lanes and is callable from first-party planning modules.
acceptance_checks.T-1103: Agile renderer produces deterministic board columns/swimlanes/blocker views and has no third-party UI runtime dependency.
acceptance_checks.T-1104: Filtering/zoom/scroll/click-through interactions are deterministic, clamped, and compatible with first-party planning state types.
acceptance_checks.T-1105: Export adapters produce ASCII/Markdown/PNG artifacts and Discord payload manifests from first-party planning models.
acceptance_checks.T-1106: Validation suite enforces dependency integrity and render consistency; App Protocol compliance evidence is required to clear completion.

lifecycle_events.note: initial sprint closure
reopened for additional compliance work
framework migration cycle

descriptions: Must comply with first-party Luvatrix App Protocol contracts.

milestones.name: Runtime Performance Hardening Closeout Signoff
success_criteria: All closeout tasks complete with consolidated evidence package.
Boundary contracts are re-validated: RenderTarget, SensorProvider, HDIThread/SensorManagerThread separation, and protocol/AppContext compatibility.
Determinism and compatibility checks pass under a unified reproducible benchmark protocol.

Incremental-present required scenario targets are met in measured raw artifacts: scroll>=95%, horizontal_pan>=92%, drag_heavy>=85%, mixed_burst>=88%, sensor_overlay>=90%, resize_overlap_incremental_required>=75% (or formally excepted under cap policy).
Evidence validator enforces scenario-level target hard-gates and exception-cap policy; closeout cannot pass via aggregate-only summaries.
Final architecture closeout can issue Go confidence >= 0.85.
input_burst incremental_present_pct must be >=85 with full_present_pct<=15 and max_consecutive_full_frame_outside_exception<=8.
strict evidence validator must hard-fail scenario-level target/cap misses unless approved exception metadata is present.
summary artifacts must embed per-scenario policy verdicts and top-level policy_verdict before closeout pass.

lifecycle_events.note: closeout signoff milestone created from architecture/system no-go review
architect decision package imported: Vulkan deferred with guardrails; thresholds/invariants/exit gates finalized
strict evidence validator failed; remediation set opened for p99/resize/determinism/incremental coverage gaps
strict evidence remediation complete; tasks T-2806..T-2809 done; validators pass
evidence integrity remediation cycle opened: provenance-only evidence required (T-2810..T-2813)
provenance-backed evidence remediation complete; T-2810..T-2813 done; validators pass
incremental-present remediation cycle opened; provenance pass alone is insufficient for Go
incremental target remediation complete; T-2814..T-2818 done; scenario-level gates satisfied
final policy-gate remediation opened: input_burst threshold/cap and validator hard-gate completion required for Go

acceptance_checks.T-2801: Unified benchmark matrix with deterministic seeds and adjusted thresholds (input p95<=33.3ms, p99<=50ms, incremental>=90%, resize recovery<=1.0s) emits per-scenario verdicts.
acceptance_checks.T-2802: Vulkan decision is DEFERRED_WITH_GUARDRAILS with normative text, disallowed wording controls, fallback parity evidence, and boundary integrity proof.
acceptance_checks.T-2803: Snapshot immutability and revisioned-read invariants are specified and validated with zero-mismatch determinism replay requirements.
acceptance_checks.T-2804: Incremental-present scenario targets/caps are met, or approved exceptions are documented within hard caps and artifact checks pass.
acceptance_checks.T-2805: Final evidence packet reconciles board/task/artifact state and passes architecture Go/No-Go checklist without unresolved blockers.
acceptance_checks.T-2814: Dirty-region invalidation refinement removes blanket full-frame fallback on hover/theme/no-delta paths while preserving visual integrity and hit-test/z-order correctness.
acceptance_checks.T-2815: Subpixel and bi-axial compose support eliminates unconditional full-frame fallback where safe and achieves horizontal_pan>=92% and drag_heavy>=85% measured incremental rates.
acceptance_checks.T-2816: Resize policies split into stability-focused fullframe-allowed stress scenario and overlap incremental-required scenario with >=75% target and measured recovery retained.
acceptance_checks.T-2817: Strict evidence validator hard-fails scenario-level misses without approved exceptions and enforces non-control full-frame <=15% plus consecutive full-frame <=8 outside exception windows.
acceptance_checks.T-2818: Determinism replay matrix uses seed-fidelity inputs with per-seed trace provenance, distinct cross-seed fingerprints, and zero per-seed mismatch regressions.
acceptance_checks.T-2819: Validator enforces all required scenario thresholds/caps (including input_burst) with exception metadata requirements and explicit scenario-level failure output.
acceptance_checks.T-2820: Input burst compose path remediation achieves incremental>=85, full<=15, max consecutive full-frame<=8 without regressions in other required scenarios.
acceptance_checks.T-2821: Measured summary embeds required per-scenario policy verdict fields and top-level policy_verdict; generation fails on missing verdict inputs.
acceptance_checks.T-2822: Final closeout packet/manifest/hash reconciliation completed with scenario verdict table and all validators passing.

descriptions: All closeout tasks complete with consolidated evidence package.

closeout_criteria.metric_description: Runtime performance hardening closeout score with scenario-level policy hard-gates.
hard_no_go_conditions: any required scenario below incremental target without approved exception metadata
full_present_pct cap violation in required non-control scenario
determinism digest or invariant mismatch in required scenarios
unresolved high-severity blocker in closeout packet
